calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2004 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Apr-20-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Colin Claxon, Esq. for Plaintiff Coastside Lumber Supply, Inc. dba South City Lumber.
Plaintiff's witness David Azzopardi present, was sworn & examined.
Exh. 1 - Copy of Cal. Business Corp. Lic. #C191237 ---------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 2 - Copy of credit application dated 9-27-94 ----------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 3 - Copy of Contractor Lic. #483553 and Bond #145261---------ID/EVID.
Exh. 4 - Copy of open invoice for balance owing $2,377.27---------ID/EVID.
Exh. 5 - Copy of credit application dated 02-17-96----------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 6 - Copy of Contractor Lic. #616045--------------------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 7 - Copy of open invoices of balance owing $7,265.51---------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, witness testimony and statement in support, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants.
Proposed Judgment received in court, the Court to reviews and fill in the amount of the award.
Counsel stiupulated for the return of the exhibits in open court.

April 23, 2004
Judgment granted as follows:
Judgment against Defendant: Fell Franklin Corp. for Principal and Interest in the amount of $9,425.51.
Judgement against Defendants: Daly Ferson Construction, James Gerard Daly and William H. Ferson, III for Principal and Interest in the total amount of $3,057.27.
The Plaintiff shall recover its costs in the sum of $452.10 and attorney fees in the sum of
$3,588.00 and each of the above Defendants is jointly and severally liable for the total amount of said costs and attorney fees.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
